strategies.name: HistogramFade
strategies.idea: Long when MACD histogram turns from negative to less negative meaning histogram starts rising indicating bullish momentum building
strategies.description: MACD histogram inflection point momentum strategy

strategies.name: VolumeSpikeFade
strategies.idea: Short when volume is 3x the 20-bar average on an up bar and price closes in the lower 25 percent of its range indicating supply climax

strategies.name: RSIOverbought
strategies.idea: Short when RSI rises above 70 and price is below the 200 EMA, exit when RSI falls back below 50
strategies.description: RSI overbought short with EMA filter

strategies.name: ZScoreReversion
strategies.idea: Short when the 20-bar z-score of price rises above positive 2.0, exit when z-score returns to zero

strategies.name: SupplyClimax
strategies.idea: Short when a wide spread up bar closes on its low with very high volume indicating supply climax and smart money distribution
